name: Ted Cruz

contactInfo.office: 127A Russell Senate Office Building, Washington, DC 20510

bio: Ted Cruz has served as U.S. Senator from Texas since 2013. A graduate of Princeton University and Harvard Law School, Cruz previously served as Solicitor General of Texas. He ran for president in 2016 and is known for his conservative stance on constitutional issues, border security, and limited government.
campaignPromises: Secure the border and end illegal immigration
Cut taxes and reduce regulations on businesses
Protect gun rights and religious liberty
Oppose federal overreach and defend the Constitution
